title: Wikidata Power Tools
description: For when you feel like making several million edits to Wikidata

tools.name: mm_wikidata_todo
tools.title: Wikidata Todo
tools.description: Shows you little things you can do on Wikidata.

tools.name: mm_find_duplicate_items
tools.title: Find duplicate items
tools.description: Find duplicate items on Wikidata, via labels/aliases.

tools.name: mm_wikidata_game
tools.title: The Wikidata Game
tools.description: A set of games to quickly add statements to Wikidata.

tools.name: toolforge-shexstatements
tools.title: ShExStatements
tools.description: ShExStatements allows the users to generate entity schemas and shape expressions from simple CSV statements.

tools.name: toolforge-commons-mass-description
tools.title: Commons Mass Description
tools.description: Add description to Commons images en masse

tools.name: quickstatements
tools.title: QuickStatements
tools.description: Tool to edit Wikidata items, based on a simple set of text commands. The tool can add and remove statements, labels, descriptions and aliases; as well as add statements with optional qualifiers and sources.

tools.name: toolforge-harvesting-data-refinery
tools.title: Harvesting Data Refinery
tools.description: Tool allowing you to clean data you added to Wikidata. It will show you the data you added and with one click you'll revert your own edit.

tools.name: toolforge-ranker
tools.title: Ranker
tools.description: tool to edit the rank of multiple Wikidata statements at once

tools.name: mm_mixnmatch
tools.title: Mix'n'match
tools.description: GLAM catalog/Wikidata matching tool; red link lists on steroids.

tools.name: toolforge-weapon-of-mass-description
tools.title: Weapon of Mass Description
tools.description: This tool will allow users to describe (add labels) to Wikidata items en masse.

tools.name: mm_petscan
tools.title: PetScan
tools.description: PetScan can generate lists of Wikipedia (and related projects) pages or Wikidata items that match certain criteria, such as all pages in a certain category, or all items with a certain property. PetScan can also combine some temporary lists (here called 'sources') in various ways, to create a new one.

tools.name: mm_duplicity
tools.title: Duplicity
tools.description: Find Wikipedia articles without associated Wikidata items, and match or create a new item.

tools.name: toolforge-lexeme-forms
tools.title: Wikidata Lexeme Forms
tools.description: A tool to create Wikidata lexemes with a set of forms (e. g. declensions).
